company.name: Horizon Retail Group
company.locations: 12 store locations across Punjab and Sindh
company.tech_stack_notes: Uses Zendesk for support, Google Sheets for reporting, no existing automation platform

message: We're evaluating tools to automate our customer support and reporting workflows across 12 store locations. Budget is approved for Q3, looking to decide within 3 weeks. Would like a call this week if possible.

past_interactions.notes: Attended 'Automating retail operations' webinar, asked question about multi-location reporting
Submitted form same week as webinar

bant_notes: Budget confirmed, Mariam has approval authority as VP Ops, clear need (manual reporting across 12 locations), timeline is tight (3 weeks)
